TestCase z38Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data2 = (double*)malloc(t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data2, t1.data2, t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data2 = follow_case_data2;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n2 < 1) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Decrement a random element by 0.2 when the element > minimum double
    int idx = rand() % follow_case.n2;
    const double MIN_DOUBLE = 2.2250738585072014e-308;
    if (follow_case.data2[idx] > MIN_DOUBLE) {
        follow_case.data2[idx] -= 0.2;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
